hook.command:
.claude/hooks/pyrun -c "
import json, sys, re
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
ti = d.get('tool_input', {})
p = ti.get('file_path', '')
skip = ['node_modules', '.claude/', 'test/', '.md']
if any(s in p for s in skip):
    sys.exit(0)
content = ti.get('content', '') or ti.get('new_string', '')
if not content:
    sys.exit(0)
violations = []
qf = re.search(r'//\s*(hack|workaround|band-?aid|quick\s*fix|temp(orary)?\s*fix|hotfix)\b', content, re.IGNORECASE)
if qf:
    violations.append(qf.group(0).strip())
td = re.search(r'//\s*(TODO|FIXME):\s*(fix later|investigate later|come back|revisit|temporary)\b', content, re.IGNORECASE)
if td:
    violations.append(td.group(0).strip())
if violations:
    print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': '[STEER] Detected ' + violations[0] + '. Quick-fix markers suggest a workaround rather than a root-cause fix. Consider addressing the underlying issue.'}))
    sys.exit(0)
sys.exit(0)
"
